description_long: This is a classic assault rifle with a wooden fixed stock, wooden handguard, and pistol grip, paired with a metallic receiver and barrel assembly. The rifle features a curved detachable box magazine, typical of the AK-47 family, and a prominent front sight post with a rear notch sight. The metallic components have a matte, slightly glossy finish, while the wooden parts display a rich, brown grain. The barrel is standard length and ends with a simple slant muzzle device. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, suitable for rugged urban environments.
description: A robust assault rifle with a wooden stock and handguard, metallic receiver, and a curved detachable magazine. Features classic iron sights and a slant muzzle device.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the wooden stock, handguard, pistol grip, curved magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the barrel, front sight post, and the narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, handguard, pistol grip, and the magazine from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear-on view showing the butt of the wooden stock and the alignment of the receiver and barrel.
